meaning: n.[鐢焆澶у瀷搴曟爾鐢熺墿
examples: There were no clear differences in density or distribution of the macrobenthos between spring and fall.
The biomass of macrobenthos is higher in Autumn while that of meiobenthos tends to be higher in both Spring and Autumn.
The distributions of macrobenthos are closely related to waters' temperature. salinity, sediment types and sheltered degree of bay.
